title: Dynamic filters with typed validation
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.Search.validated_search/1` that accepts a params map and returns `{:ok, users}` or `{:error, reason}`. Optional filters: `"age_range"` (tuple `{min, max}` where both must be integers), `"role"` (must be in `["admin", "user", "guest"]`), `"active"` (must be bool). Validate each param before adding to the dynamic. Return `{:error, :invalid_role}` if role is unknown, etc. Build final dynamic with `dynamic(true)` + `Enum.reduce`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts/search.ex`.
tier_rationale: Dynamic + validation + error propagation inside a reduce is a multi-pattern combination.
